users.reason: To set presence on behalf of Navidrome users

http.reason: To set presence and refresh tokens with Discord, and look up album art

kvstore.reason: To persist each user's Discord token and session

scheduler.reason: To keep the presence session alive on long tracks

users.title: User bindings
users.description: One entry per Navidrome user that should broadcast presence

token.title: Config value from the connect page

art_providers.title: Album art providers
art_providers.description: Ordered art sources, the first match wins. Remove one to disable it, reorder for priority, or leave the list empty for no art.

header.title: Card header template
header.description: The "Listening to" line. A template with {artist}, {albumartist}, {album}, {track} placeholders, or fixed text of your own.

details.title: First line template
details.description: The first line under the header. Same placeholders as the header.

state.title: Second line template
state.description: The second line. Same placeholders as the header.

client_id.title: Own Discord app client ID
client_id.description: Leave blank to use the shared app. Set this only if you run your own Discord application, it must match the app the connect page authorized against.
